valueProps.title: A doctor who knows you
valueProps.description: Same prescriber, every visit. Quarterly follow-ups included.

valueProps.title: Strains named by members
valueProps.description: Each season a member co-develops a strain. Their name on the jar.

valueProps.title: A real address, real people
valueProps.description: A Lisbon townhouse, seven clinicians, members welcome.

pageContent.homeHeroTitle: A medical practice that knows your name.
pageContent.homeHeroDescription: We are a small clinical team and a smaller community of patients. Apply to join — there is no waitlist, only a conversation.

home.heroTitle: A medical practice that knows your name.
home.heroDescription: We are a small clinical team and a smaller community of patients.

about.heading: We built a practice. The membership built itself.
about.mission: Family Tree is a private medical-cannabis practice in Lisbon, founded in 2024 by Dr Elena Marques and four founder-patients, organised around the relationship between a prescriber and the patient in their care.
about.story: Founded around a kitchen table in Príncipe Real in 2024, Family Tree began as a conversation between Dr Marques and four patients she had been treating for years. The question — what would a medical-cannabis service look like if patients owned a piece of it — became a townhouse, seven clinicians, and 340 founding members.
about.values: Relationship first. Lineage on the label. Patience as a clinical virtue.

contact.heading: Visit the townhouse
contact.hours: Tuesday to Friday, 09:30–18:00 WET. Saturday by appointment. Closed Sundays and Mondays — for the clinicians.

pageContent.aboutMission: Family Tree is a private medical-cannabis practice in Lisbon, founded in 2024 by Dr Elena Marques and four founder-patients, organised around the relationship between a prescriber and the patient in their care.

educationHotspots.title: Why membership is free
educationHotspots.description: Charging for membership would mean the practice was more available to members who could pay more. We considered it and chose not to. You pay for medicine and consultations — same as any private clinic — and the relationship is included.

educationHotspots.title: How a strain gets a member's name
educationHotspots.description: When a member's months of titration produce an unusually well-tuned formulation, the practice asks — with their permission — to manufacture it as a small-batch named strain. Recognition, not ownership; the formulation belongs to the practice.

footer.tagline: A members' medical-cannabis practice · Lisbon · INFARMED licensed
footer.disclaimer: Family Tree is a private medical practice authorised by INFARMED to prescribe medical cannabis to eligible patients in Portugal. Membership is free; consultations and medication are paid services. For prescription use only. Patients only. Not for sale to under-18s. The information on this site supports — but does not replace — the relationship between a patient and their physician.
